name: Ember Court
specialty: A versatile crew of specialists, known for their ability to adapt to any situation, making them the go-to team for jobs requiring a diverse skill set.

members.name: Rynn Tavish
members.note: A battle-scarred veteran with a silver eyepatch, he's earned his reputation through cunning and sheer force of will.

members.name: Seraphina Serrano
members.note: Her keen senses and unyielding focus make her an asset in navigating the treacherous Undercity.

members.name: Baelor Ironfist
members.note: Known for his imposing size and fearsome reputation, he's a force to be reckoned with when it comes to physical combat.

members.name: Kaelan Flameheart
members.note: His charm and silver tongue have earned him many favors, but his past with the Argent Blades remains a mystery.

visual: Clad in leather and chain mail, they move with an air of seasoned professionals. Each member wears a red bandana tied around their forearm, a symbol of their allegiance to the Ember Court.
reputation_note: Ember Court is a name whispered in both fear and respect. They're known for their ability to tackle jobs no one else dares to touch, and their successes often come with a hefty price tag.
